TRAINEE

Forethought

Role Frontend/Backend
Duration Mar '24 - Apr '24
Focus Area Web App
Technologies Python, JS

The Challenge

Building an interactive coding platform that required both a stable backend logic framework and an intuitive, responsive frontend for users to engage with HACK-X features.

The Solution

Under expert guidance, I contributed to the Python-based backend project architecture while simultaneously developing responsive UI components. I collaborated with the development team to deliver functional frontend components, strengthening my full-stack engineering skills.

{ HACK-X }
